important_issues.title: Load realism stress loop was not worker-parameterized
important_issues.detail: `tests/integration/scenarios/concurrency_test.go` had an `N=50` OCC loop, but race worker count was hardcoded to 2 in `runSingleOCCRace`, reducing stress configurability and explicitness of expected loser counts.
important_issues.fix: Parameterize `runSingleOCCRace` with `workers`, add `occRaceWorkers` constant usage in callers, and assert losers as `workers-1`. Also replaced timing-based coordination (`time.Sleep`) in skip-locked worker test with a WaitGroup barrier to keep race orchestration deterministic.

quality_checks.1_anti_flake_controls: PASS (after IMP-001) - race paths use WaitGroup/channel barriers; skip-locked worker coordination no longer relies on time.Sleep.
quality_checks.2_isolation: PASS - DB-dependent tests skip when DATABASE_URL/METALDOCS_DATABASE_URL is unset and use per-test deterministic IDs + explicit cleanup to avoid cross-test leakage.
quality_checks.3_authz_matrix: PASS - membership tests cover direct writer insert blocked path and SECURITY DEFINER fn callable/idempotent behavior.
quality_checks.4_tx_owner_scan: PASS - tx ownership scan checks both repository and HTTP handler directories.
quality_checks.5_load_realism: PASS (after IMP-001) - `concurrency_test` includes N=50 stress loop with parameterized workers.
quality_checks.6_legacy_absent_comprehensive: PASS - legacy literal checks cover both Go (`internal/**.go`) and TS/TSX (`frontend/apps/web/src/**`).
quality_checks.7_outbox_paired: PASS - outbox tests cover both commit path persistence and rollback atomic omission.
quality_checks.8_idempotency_concurrent: PASS - concurrent same-key insert test explicitly expects SQLSTATE 23505 collisions and single-row final state.
quality_checks.9_e2e_stub_documented: PASS - e2e test documents full API flow with ordered steps and cleanly skips when server URL is absent.

fixes_required.description: Parameterize OCC race workers in N=50 stress loop and replace timing-based synchronization with barrier-based coordination in skip-locked concurrency path.
